title: Calcite Design System from Esri – UI framework
content: Calcite from Directories: Components: Calcite Design System offers a comprehensive suite of design and development resources for creating cohesive, user-friendly experiences across Esri applications. Esri Design System features a UI kit, icons, color schemes, and a wide web component library. Components provides a rich collection of flexible, framework-agnostic web components, enabling efficient and consistent web application development with minimal effort. Accessibility Color System Component overview Figma Repository Icons Theming Tokens Typography Accordion Action bar Alert banner Avatar Button Cards Checkbox Chip Combobox Data table Date picker Drawer Dropdown Filter input Icon Label Link List Menus Modal Page header Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Segmented control Select Slider Switch Tabs Text area Text field Tooltip Tree view
